description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, olive-green tubular frame that encases its body, providing structural protection and a rugged aesthetic. The vehicle is equipped with four large, black tires designed for off-road use, and the wheels are spaced widely for stability. At the rear, two prominent cylindrical exhausts or propulsion units are mounted, angled upward, and a thin antenna extends from the back, suggesting remote control or communication capability. The cockpit area is open, with visible green control panels and a central seat, surrounded by the protective roll cage. The front of the vehicle displays two hexagonal headlights and a reinforced bumper, while the sides reveal the exposed mechanical components and the sturdy frame. The overall design emphasizes durability, maneuverability, and safety for navigating rough urban or park terrains.
description: A rugged olive-green all-terrain vehicle with a tubular roll cage, four large black tires, rear-mounted exhausts, and hexagonal headlights, designed for off-road urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hexagonal headlights, reinforced bumper, and the open cockpit framed by the roll cage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the tubular frame, large tires, rear exhausts, and visible control panels inside the cockpit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual cylindrical exhausts, antenna, and the back of the roll cage structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the frame, wheels, and rear-mounted components.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires appear to have a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern suitable for gripping uneven surfaces and providing traction on both urban and off-road environments.
